summary: P0 FAZ-1 Security Testing Complete - All requirements verified: ENVIRONMENT/SECRET_KEY config enforcement, seed automation disabled, hardcoded passwords removed, Stripe tokenization implemented, webhook replay protection active, dealer login and saved cards flow working

issues: Hydration warning in console - tr element inside span (non-critical)

environment_config.details: ENVIRONMENT env var is required (development|staging|production). Server fails to start without it.

secret_key_config.details: SECRET_KEY is mandatory and must be >= 32 bytes. No fallback allowed.

seed_automation_disabled.details: No automatic user seeding in lifespan(). Manual fixtures require ALLOW_MANUAL_FIXTURE_SEED=true env var.

hardcoded_passwords_removed.details: No Admin123/Dealer123/User123 patterns found in server.py, config.py, or security.py runtime code. Test files still have them (acceptable).

saved_cards_api_tokenization.details: DealerSavedCardPayload uses extra='forbid' - card_number field rejected with 422. Requires payment_method_id, last4, brand, expiry_month, expiry_year.

webhook_replay_protection.details: _ensure_stripe_webhook_not_replayed() checks signature timestamp. Stale signatures (>5min default) return 400 'Stale Stripe webhook signature'.

frontend_stripe_elements.details: DealerSettings uses @stripe/react-stripe-js CardElement. PCI note displayed: 'Kart numarası ve CVV sunucumuza gelmez. Stripe tokenization (Elements) kullanılır.'

dealer_login_regression.details: Dealer login works with dealer@platform.com / Dealer123!

dealer_saved_cards_screen.details: Saved cards section loads with Stripe CardElement form, holder name input, and cards table.

secret_key_invalidation.details: Tokens signed with old fallback key 'your-super-secret-key-change-in-production-2024' are rejected (401).

code_review_findings.config_enforcement: config.py properly raises RuntimeError for missing/invalid ENVIRONMENT and SECRET_KEY (lines 9-14, 51-54)
code_review_findings.seed_guards: seed_manual_fixtures.py blocks in production and requires ALLOW_MANUAL_FIXTURE_SEED env var
code_review_findings.password_env_vars: _fixture_password_from_env() requires env variables for fixture passwords with 12-char minimum
code_review_findings.webhook_timestamp_check: _ensure_stripe_webhook_not_replayed() in server.py validates timestamp from stripe-signature header
code_review_findings.pydantic_extra_forbid: DealerSavedCardPayload has model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid') which blocks unexpected fields

critical_code_review_comments: Test files in /app/backend/tests/ still contain hardcoded passwords like Admin123! - these are test credentials, not runtime code. Consider using env vars for test credentials in future.
Hydration warning in DealerSettings - <tr> inside <span> in table rendering (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)
seed_data_creation: Test saved card created and deleted during API contract testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 FAZ-1 security requirements fully verified. ENVIRONMENT and SECRET_KEY are mandatory. Seed automation is disabled - use ALLOW_MANUAL_FIXTURE_SEED=true with fixture env vars to seed users. Saved cards API requires tokenized payload (payment_method_id) and rejects raw card_number. Webhook replay protection uses 5-minute default window (STRIPE_WEBHOOK_MAX_AGE_SECONDS).

verified_requirements.1_environment_mandatory: PASS - RuntimeError raised if missing or invalid
verified_requirements.2_secret_key_mandatory_min32: PASS - RuntimeError raised if missing or <32 bytes
verified_requirements.3_seed_automation_disabled: PASS - No auto-seed calls in lifespan(), manual requires env var
verified_requirements.4_hardcoded_passwords_removed: PASS - Runtime code clean, test files acceptable
verified_requirements.7_dealer_regression: PASS - Login and saved cards screen working
